name: cael-logistics
description: Sistema Profissional de Gestao de Transportes e Logistica.
author: CAEL Logistics

scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k "vite" "wait-on tcp:3010 && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && esbuild electron/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist-electron/preload.cjs --external:electron && electron ."
scripts.electron:build: tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && esbuild electron/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist-electron/preload.cjs --external:electron && vite build && electron-builder
scripts.build:exe: npm run electron:build -- --win && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const dest=path.join(process.env.USERPROFILE,'Documents','InstallerApp');fs.mkdirSync(dest,{recursive:true});const exe=fs.readdirSync('dist_electron').find(f=>f.endsWith('.exe'));if(exe){fs.copyFileSync(path.join('dist_electron',exe),path.join(dest,exe));console.log('\n>> Instalador copiado com sucesso para: ' + path.join(dest,exe));}else{console.log('\n>> Erro: Instalador (.exe) nao encontrado em dist_electron.');}"
scripts.build:setup: npm run electron:build -- --win && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const dest=path.join(process.env.USERPROFILE,'Documents','Installers');fs.mkdirSync(dest,{recursive:true});const exe=fs.readdirSync('dist_electron').find(f=>f.endsWith('.exe'));if(exe){fs.copyFileSync(path.join('dist_electron',exe),path.join(dest,exe));console.log('\n>> Setup guiado (Wizard) criado com sucesso em: ' + path.join(dest,exe));}else{console.log('\n>> Erro: Setup (.exe) nao encontrado.');}"
